column1: Roland J-6 Preset Sounds Settings Ver. 1.0
column8: Italics = User Adjustable (Initial control setting noted)

column25: Mellow Sub Octave Pluck: Mild Sustain once Envelope control is past 50% (Good for Deadmaus5)
Mellow Mallet: Sustains once Envelope control is past 50%
Noisy Mellow Pluck: Sustains once Envelope control is past 50%
Noisy Octave Pluck: Sustains once Envelope control is past 50%
Harpsichord: Sustains + PWM once Envelope control is past 50%
Chorus Clavinet: Sustains once Envelope control is past 50%
Chorus Harp: Mild Sustain once Envelope control is past 50%
Staccato Steel Drum: LFO retriggers at 1/8th notes in a SAW wave once Envelope Control is past 50%
Bright Detuned Saw Pluck: Sustains once Envelope control is past 50% (Increase Attack for Brass Ensemble Stab)
Synthy 80s Clean Guitar: Sustains once Envelope control is past 50%
Gliding Noisy Pluck: Sustains once Envelope control is past 50%
Octave Splash: Mild Sustain once Envelope control is past 50%
Brass Pluck: VCA Gate for low Envelope settings, VCA Env for high Envelope settings (Attack only)
Acid Saw: (Turn Attack to 0% for pure Saw Pluck)
Bright Trumpet: (Turn Attack to 0% for Plectrum Bass Guitar)
Gliding Pulse Lead I: Wide LFO Filter Sweep for low Filter/Envelope values
Angry Cat: Gliding noisy lead with fast filter modulation
PWM Envelope: VCA Gate for low Envelope settings, VCA Env for high Envelope settings
Square Chorus Lead: VCA Gate for low Envelope settings, VCA Env for high Envelope settings
Ocarina: Keyboard tracked self-oscilating filtered noise (Turn down Resonance to increase noise)
Ghost Pad: (Open filter for Noisy String Ensemble)
Evolving Filter Pad III (Mellow Slow and Wide):
Evolving Filter Pad IV (Bright Slow and Wide):
Decaying Filter Pad (Blossoming III): Sustains once Envelope control is past 50%
Sample and Hold Pad: Freerunning S&H LFO to Filter. S&H effect dissapears for high Filter Settings
Plectrum Tremolo Pad: Freerunning SAW LFO to Filter. Tremolo effect dissapears for high Filter Settings
